query:
SELECT bookTitle, authorName, 
  LEFT(coverImageUrl, 80) as coverUrl,
  LEFT(s3CoverUrl, 60) as s3Url,
  coverStatus
FROM book_profiles
WHERE coverStatus = 'not-found' 
   OR coverStatus = 'skipped'
   OR coverStatus IS NULL
   OR coverImageUrl IS NULL 
   OR coverImageUrl = ''
   OR s3CoverUrl IS NULL
   OR s3CoverUrl = ''
ORDER BY bookTitle
LIMIT 30;
